description.summary: Add install paths and trigger syntax for Cursor, Codex CLI, and Gemini CLI so the TC skill works across all major AI coding agents
description.motivation: The skill registries (antigravity, VoltAgent, daymade) all value cross-agent compatibility. Currently the skill only targets Claude Code. Supporting other agents widens the addressable user base and strengthens the registry submissions.
description.detailed_design: Map each agent's skill directory convention (.cursor/skills/, .codex/skills/, .gemini/skills/), adapt trigger syntax if needed, add per-agent install instructions to README, and integrate into the npm CLI (TC-004) via --cursor/--codex/--gemini flags.

files_affected.description: Added per-agent install instructions for Claude Code, Cursor, Codex CLI, Gemini CLI, and GitHub Copilot

handoff.progress_summary: TC created, no work started yet
next_steps: 1. Research each agent's skill directory conventions
2. Test SKILL.md frontmatter compatibility with each agent
3. Add per-agent install instructions to README
5. Test install and trigger on each platform
blockers: Depends on TC-004 npm package for CLI flag integration
handoff.key_context: The SKILL.md format follows the agentskills.io spec which is cross-agent by design. Main work is path mapping and install docs, not skill rewriting.
